payload.title: Security audit: harden multi-tenant hosted Scope
payload.description: Findings from an adversarial security audit (5 parallel reviewers + manual verification) of the SCP-167/185 hosted multi-tenant auth + collaboration work. Each child is a verified, code-traced issue. Severity in the title; critical/high are exploitable by an authenticated tenant member (or unauthenticated, for some) and break tenant isolation, allow stored XSS, arbitrary file write, account takeover, or DoS.
